arts.ttl: Liverpool sent firm transfer warning amid Karim Adeyemi, Omar Marmoush, Alvaro Fernandez links
arts.sum: Liverpool expert David Lynch comments on the Reds' prospects of pulling off transfer deals for Karim Adeyemi, Omar Marmoush and Alvaro Fernandez in 2025.

arts.ttl: Manchester City news: Could Xabi Alonso replace Pep Guardiola this summer?
arts.sum: Manchester City are reportedly considering Bayer Leverkusen's Xabi Alonso and Sporting Lisbon's Ruben Amorim as potential replacements for Pep Guardiola.

arts.ttl: Alonso confirms Wirtz will be in Leverkusen's squad to face Frankfurt
arts.sum: Despite picking up an injury on international duty, Florian Wirtz will be in Bayer Leverkusen's squad to face Eintracht Frankfurt on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Hoffenheim’s Tom Bischof and Bayer Leverkusen’s Francis Onyeka winners of the Fritz Walter Medal
arts.sum: The DFB have announced the winners and runners-up of the 2024 Fritz Walter medals in the under-19 and under-17 categories. The under-19 category was won by Hoffenheim’s Tom BIshcof. The…

arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt’s Omar Marmoush named Bundesliga Player of the Month for September
arts.sum: The Bundesliga after announced that Eintracht Frankfurt striker Omar Marmoush has won the Player of the Month award for September. In the month of September, Marmoush finished with five goals…

arts.ttl: Omar Marmoush wants to win the Bundesliga with Eintracht Frankfurt
arts.sum: Over the course of the summer transfer window, there were a number of reports linking Omar Marmoush with a move away from Eintracht Frankfurt. At one point, a move to…

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen vs Eintracht Frankfurt preview: Post-break reset for the champions
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen sit just three points behind the Bundesliga leaders as they prepare for their game week seven clash against third-placed Eintracht Frankfurt at the BayArena on Saturday. The hosts are looking to reset after back-to-back draws.

arts.ttl: Director breaks silence on Xabi Alonso joining Real Madrid
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen are 'relaxed' about Real Madrid's reported interest in Xabi Alonso, according to director Simon Rolfes. In recent weeks, fresh speculation surrounding Alonso has appeared again, with German and Spanish media insisting that Real Madrid are plotting a move for 2025 despite the fact that Carlo Ancelotti remains under contract until 2026.

arts.ttl: Marmoush crowned Bundesliga Player of the Month
arts.sum: The Eintracht forward fought off fierce competition to win the September vote.
